text.title: SDD Workflow Overview Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply SDD Workflow Overview end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: init-manifest
step.action: Create manifest.json with feature id + phase=spec + version=0.1.0.

step.name: write-spec
step.action: Run writing-specifications methodology; promote phase to design after L5 gate.

step.name: write-design
step.action: Run writing-design-documents; promote to impl-plan after gate.

step.name: execute-tasks
step.action: Run tasks per task-creation-parallelization; promote to review.

step.name: review-and-close
step.action: Run review-workflow; close feature when all gates pass.
